text:
Once upon a time, in a quaint town nestled between rolling hills and a sparkling river, there lived a curious boy named Tommy. Tommy loved adventure, even if it meant taking on challenges that seemed too big for his small frame. One sunny afternoon, after rummaging through the attic with his father, he discovered a box filled with old wooden toys.

Encouraged by the promise of new games, Tommy placed them in the living room. Among them was an old, wooden horse with cracked reins that squeaked slightly when ridden. It stood there as if waiting for its next grand adventure.

Tommy practiced riding it, the unstable equine obedient only to his steady hands. He imagined majestic gallops over rolling hills and daring escapades across enchanted forests. Each ride brought him closer to the excitement he craved.
